description: As the situation escalates at the lab, Ghost Rider (Robbie) arrives and intervenes in the fight against Frederick. Fitz and Mack witness Ghost Rider’s powers firsthand as he annihilates Frederick. Daisy arrives just in time to help free Mack from the reactor, while Fitz stops the meltdown. Ghost Rider takes a photo of the ghosts’ group as he leaves.

transcript.line: He's like the woman who got Chen, so if he does come back, you can't let him touch you. You'll go crazy. Don't let him touch you! He must've set the reactor to blow.
